message:
web: Update landing page feature sections

- Replace Team Dashboard with Team Observability using new dashboard screenshot
- Replace Beautiful Sharing with Learn From Each Other using session list

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/t5c5r98oayd1nne7u6m0ceuu

files.patch: @@ -138,11 +138,11 @@ function FeatureSection() { - + } - headline="Team Dashboard" - subheadline="See what your team is working on. Share sessions, learn from each other's prompts, and build institutional knowledge." + headline="Team Observability" + subheadline="Full visibility into your team's AI coding sessions. Track activity, measure productivity, and understand how your team uses AI tools." /> - + } - headline="Beautiful Sharing" - subheadline="Share sessions with a link. Clean, readable pages with syntax highlighting and rich previews that make your prompts look as good as they work." + headline="Learn From Each Other" + subheadline="See what prompts your teammates are using and how they're solving problems. Build shared knowledge from real sessions." /> }
